title: Seeking to Rely Less on China, U.S. Pushes a Rare Earths Partnership on a Reluctant Brazil
summary_full: Seeking to reduce its reliance on China, the United States is pushing for a critical minerals deal with Brazil. The South American country is less eager.
summary_public: Seeking to reduce its reliance on China, the United States is pushing for a critical minerals deal with Brazil. The South American country is less eager.
